data.title: Protocol page — manifesto + Fractal OS links

data.body: Manifesto-style layout of the Fractal Protocol. Content from Fractal OS synthesis (The Junkyard, Third Brain, Compound Engineering, Play Fractal, The MMO, Fractal Pill, Forkability). Links to Fractal OS, 'how to make Fractal yourself'. Connects the houses conceptually.

UPDATED: Pull protocol content from Fractal OS synthesis doc. The protocol layers: The Junkyard, Third Brain, Compound Engineering, Play Fractal, The MMO, Fractal Pill, Forkability. Link back to Fractal OS. Source: /Users/jules/Documents/dev/fractal-os/notes/2026-03-28-fractal-nyc-website-synthesis.md
